gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; finally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students who clutch resumes inside branded folders are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff are scanning registrations and handing out lanyards at the entrance, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

At the fair, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors are reminding attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students who clutch resumes inside branded folders are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is played over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students who clutch resumes inside branded folders are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.
